title: Camps for children during school holidays - X Labs Zurich
text: 078 629 09 06 City Menu EN DE City EN DE Science camps in Zurich All children aged from 8 to 12 years old are welcome to join our camps during the school vacations and discover the exciting world of science. Camps are bilingual English-German.Looking for children's activities that are both fun and stimulating? X Labs multi-activity vacation camps will keep your kids busy, entertained and hungry to find out more about the wonderful world of science! Whether it's using magic to unlock the secrets of of Harry Potter or exploring just what it is that makes Mars so cold, our camps help children develop their love for science while having a great time with lots of new friends.Our fully-equipped laboratories and great location allow us to offer fun outdoor games in the morning and mind-blowing scientific experiments during the afternoon.Interested in finding out more? Get in touch with us now! Camps for boys and girls aged 8-12 Small groups: limited number of places Professional and qualified animators Travel cards and entrance tickets included Suitable for all diets and allergies: kids bring their own lunch (fridge and microwave are available) Extra hours upon request for an additional fee Fruits, snacks and drinks are provided Family discount available Schedule Below you'll find our program for spring, summer and winter holiday camps in X Labs Zurich. Dates;Camps; 13-17 July 2026; Chemistry of perfumes link=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/the-chemistry-of-perfumes; More info button=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/the-chemistry-of-perfumes 20-24 July 2026; Super Engineers link=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/super-engineers; More info button=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/super-engineers 27-31 July 2026; Forensic sciences link=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/forensic-sciences; More info button=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/forensic-sciences 3-7 August 2026; Art and sciences link=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/art-and-sciences; More info button=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/art-and-sciences 10-14 August 2026; Cool chemistry link=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/cool-chemistry ; More info button=https://xlabs.ch/en/camps/cool-chemistry Button Choose Your Camp Adventure Select a theme from five amazing options and join us for a week of discovery, fun, and friendship as we unravel the mysteries of science together! Cool chemistry Details Forensic sciences Details The chemistry of perfumes Details Super Engineers Details Art and sciences Details Day program For full-day camps 09h00 – 12h00 Morning Activities Museum visits, trips to animal parks, boat rides, excursions, exciting city quests, outdoor sports in good weather, hikes, swimming pool (only in summer), etc. 12h00 – 14h00 Lunch Break Children bring their homemade meals, and the mediators warm them up on site. Afterwards, the children enjoy playing board games, reading, or drawing. 14h00 – 17h00 Scientific Workshops The children take part in exciting scientific workshops in the lab, where they explore concepts through hands-on activities and experiments that spark curiosity and creativity. Price, availability, booking Contact us for special requests or to get a family discount Science CampCHF 430.- Half-day: 14h - 17h5 days / 1 child Afternoon program:Science workshopsOne healthy snack: fruits, biscuits, cereal bars, drinksSafety glasses, lab coats, glovesLab journal and certificate Science PlusMultiactivity CampCHF 650.- Full day: 9h - 17h5 days / 1 child Morning program for sunny weather: outdoor sports, hikes, visits to the animal parks, boat trips, excursions, swimmimg pool (summer only)Morning program for rainy days: workshops in the museums, city quests, board and team building gamesEntrance tickets, transportation cards are included in the priceAfternoon program:Science workshopsTwo healthy snacks: fruits, biscuits, cereal bars, drinksSafety glasses, lab coats, glovesLab journal and certificate Camp Zurich 430 CHF CHF Book now The places are available until you see "Out of stock" message.Your booking is confirmed after the payment. Lunch Only for the full-day camps: please bring a lunchbox, children can warm up their lunch on place. Children eat together with animators. Personal belonings We kindly ask you to provide comfortable and suitable cloths for outdoor activities depending on the weather conditions. Please bring a water bottle with you every day. In summer, a cap and solar cream are also required for the activities in the morning. Extra hours On demand, early arrival at 8h and/or late pickup at 18h is possible for an additional fee of CHF 25/hour Behaviour X Labs reserves the right to exclude a participant who deliberately disrupts a course. The totality of the course fee remains due in the case of exclusion due to unacceptable behaviour (insults, aggression, voluntary damage to equipment, etc.). Illness/Accident In case of illness or accident, parents are immediately notified. In case of illness, parents must find alternative care if the child is contagious, if the child has a temperature higher than 37.5°C or if the child's general condition does not allow him/her to participate in the course. Mail Phone WhatsApp Subscribe to our newsletter Be the first to hear about our events, workshops and camps. And no spam, of course.
